title: Property Consultant - Jayabheri Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Jayabheri Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!
